langChanged: Switched to English. تم التبديل إلى الإنجليزية.
authSubtitle: The comprehensive educational platform for the visually impaired and blind
welcomeMessage: Welcome to the enhanced Cloud School educational platform for the visually impaired and blind. Please log in to get started.
registerFormOpen: New account registration form. Select account type and enter your details.
registerLoginLink: Already have an account? Sign In
brailleIncomplete: You haven't formed a complete Arabic character yet. The character needs at least 6 dots.
brailleFirst: Please write an answer in Braille or use voice input first.
gameTrueFalseStart: True or False challenge! You'll hear statements and must identify if they're correct before time runs out.
gameSpeedStart: Hero mode! Answer as many questions as you can, as fast as you can. No timer per question.
gamePvPStart: Challenge mode! Compete against the clock and your friends.
gameMemoryListen: 🧠 Listen carefully to the audio sequence then repeat it.
gameMemoryStart: Audio memory game! Listen to the sounds and remember their order.
gameMemoryYourTurn: 🎤 Your turn now! Repeat the audio sequence by pressing the correct buttons.
gameMemoryNew: 🆕 New level! A new sound has been added to the sequence.
gameMemoryComplete: ✅ Excellent! You completed the sequence successfully.
gameSpeakAnswer: 🎤 Speak now or press True/False to answer.
gameNoAnswer: ⏰ I didn't hear an answer. Time's up.
gameUnclear: I didn't understand the answer. Please try again.
tutorError: Sorry, I encountered an issue preparing the answer.
storyError: Sorry, couldn't create the story right now.
teacherExportDone: Report copied to clipboard. You can paste it into any document.
parentNoChildren: No children linked to your account yet.

errors.apiKey: API Key error. Please check your key in Settings.
errors.network: Network error. Check your internet connection.
errors.fetch: Could not reach server. Make sure the proxy server is running.
errors.permission: You do not have permission for this action.
errors.unknown: Sorry, an unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

proxySecurityDesc: Gemini API key is sent directly to the proxy server and is never stored in source code. The key is saved in your browser in obfuscated form for future sessions — you can clear it from Settings at any time.
proxyProduction: For production: use Cloudflare Worker — copy proxy/worker.js to Cloudflare Dashboard
loginFailed: Incorrect username or password. If you don't have an account, click 'Create New Account'.
registerAgeRestriction: Sorry! Students under 12 cannot register independently. Please ask a parent or guardian to register first.
registerParentRequired: Strict warning: Registration cannot proceed without entering a parent phone number, email, or ID to link both accounts.
ageConfirm12: You indicated your age is 12 or older. Is your actual age 12 or older? (Selecting 'No' will go back) ✅ Yes, I am 12 or older
teacherViewActive: Teacher Dashboard is active. You can manage books, quizzes, and track student performance.
parentViewActive: Parent Dashboard is active. You can monitor your children's progress.
adminViewActive: Admin Dashboard is open. You can manage students and monitor the system.
studentViewActive: Student view is now active. Use number keys 1 through 8 to open sections.
dialogicWelcome: Welcome to the Smart Classroom! I'm your AI teacher. Press the microphone button and say a topic name.
dialogicAskTopic: 🎤 Speak now to choose a lesson topic. You can say any subject you want to study.
dialogicSpeakToChoose: Speak now to choose the topic you want to study.
dialogicLetsStart: Great! Today we'll talk about: {0}. Let's begin!
dialogicSpeakToAnswer: Speak now to answer the question.
dialogicRetry: I didn't hear your response. Please try again.
dialogicRetryStatus: 🎤 We didn't hear the answer. Please try again.
dialogicConnectionError: Sorry, there was a connection error with the AI teacher.
dialogicNextQuestion: Let's move to the next question.
dialogicSummary: Let's summarize what we learned today in our Smart Classroom session.
dialogicThankYou: Thank you! That was a great session. I learned a lot today.
studyGroupWelcome: Welcome everyone! Today's session is about: {0}. Each student will get a turn to speak.
studyGroupTurn: 💬 {0}, your turn. Please answer the question.
studyGroupPressSpeak: Press speak now to answer as {0}.
studyGroupSpeakNow: Speak now to answer the question.
studyGroupThankYou: Thank you all! That was an excellent session.
speakAfterBeep: Speak now after the beep to answer the question.
micRetry: I didn't hear the question. Please try again.
voiceExamModeActive: Voice exam mode is active. Questions will be read aloud.
voiceExamConfirm: Do you want to confirm answer '{0}'? Say yes or no.
voiceExamSubmitConfirm: Do you want to submit the final answer? Say yes to submit.
voiceExamHelp: Voice commands: say the option number to select, 'repeat' to repeat, 'submit' to confirm.
voiceExamEssayPrompt: Speak now to record your essay answer.
voiceExamEssayRecorded: Your voice answer has been recorded.
voiceExamNoQuiz: No active quiz. Please select a quiz first.
voiceExamNotAvailable: Voice mode is not available in this browser.
